border-base.note: Used at 0.16 opacity (subtle) and 0.35 opacity (strong) via rgba()

display.purpose: Hero page titles and large stat values. Teko only — the sole register for the condensed display font.

headline.purpose: Panel and section headings. Fraunces 600. Max-width 18ch.

body.purpose: All reading copy. Fraunces 400, max 54–65ch line length.

label.purpose: Kickers, eyebrows, table headers, filter labels. Fraunces 600, uppercase, 0.12em tracking.

shadows.name: panel-dark
shadows.purpose: Primary structural shadow for raised panels in dark mode.

shadows.name: panel-light
shadows.purpose: Primary structural shadow for raised panels in light mode.

shadows.name: button-hover
shadows.purpose: Button lift on hover, combined with translateY(-2px).

shadows.name: aside-card
shadows.purpose: Hero aside cards; slightly softer than panel shadow to read as nested.

motion.name: ease-out-default
motion.purpose: Standard state transitions: 0.2s. No bounce or elastic.

motion.name: ease-out-slow
motion.purpose: Slow reveal animations on content entry: 0.6s–0.8s.

breakpoints.name: mobile-max
breakpoints.note: Mobile breakpoint. Nav switches to pill scroll, layout stacks.

breakpoints.name: mid-min
breakpoints.note: Mid-screen breakpoint where nav overflow scrolling activates.

breakpoints.name: mid-max
breakpoints.note: Upper bound for mid-screen nav overflow. Also the page-shell max-width.

breakpoints.name: desktop-min
breakpoints.note: Hero homepage layout switches to single-line tagline.

breakpoints.name: wide-min
breakpoints.note: Wide viewport: hero panel reverts to side-by-side layout.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main call-to-action. Keeper's Amber gradient, pill shape, transitions on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { appearance: none; border: 0; border-radius: 999px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f0c67e 0%, #ffe0a5 100%); color: #20160d; cursor: pointer; font-family: 'Fraunces', Georgia, serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.01em; line-height: 1.15; padding: 0.95rem 1.3rem; transition: transform 0.2s ease-out, box-shadow 0.2s ease-out, filter 0.2s ease-out; min-block-size: 44px; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); filter: brightness(1.03); box-shadow: 0 18px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.22); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px) scale(0.99); box-shadow: 0 8px 14px rgba(0,0,0,0.16); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(240, 198, 126, 0.8); outline-offset: 3px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.55; cursor: not-allowed; transform: none; filter: none; box-shadow: none; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action. Transparent, bordered, Paper Proof text. Used when amber would dominate.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { appearance: none; border-radius: 999px; background: transparent; color: #f4efe5; border: 1px solid rgba(244, 239, 229, 0.14); cursor: pointer; font-family: 'Fraunces', Georgia, serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.01em; line-height: 1.15; padding: 0.95rem 1.3rem; transition: background 0.2s ease-out, box-shadow 0.2s ease-out; min-block-size: 44px; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(244, 239, 229, 0.05); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(240, 198, 126, 0.8); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Navigation Link
components.description: Pill-shaped page navigation link. Quiet at rest, amber when active.
components.html: ArchiveCompare
components.css: .ds-nav-link { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.4em; border-radius: 999px; border: 1px solid rgba(244, 239, 229, 0.1); background: rgba(244, 239, 229, 0.04); color: #cbc0b4; font-family: 'Fraunces', Georgia, serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.01em; padding: 0.72rem 0.95rem; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.18s ease-out, color 0.18s ease-out, border-color 0.18s ease-out; min-block-size: 44px; } .ds-nav-link:hover { background: rgba(244, 239, 229, 0.07); color: #f4efe5; } .ds-nav-link--active { background: rgba(240, 198, 126, 0.18); border-color: rgba(240, 198, 126, 0.42); color: #ffe0a5; } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(240, 198, 126, 0.8); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Season Chip
components.description: Multi-select filter pill for season/year selection. Quiet until selected.
components.css: .ds-season-chip { position: relative; cursor: pointer; } .ds-season-chip span { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 0.6rem 1rem; border-radius: 999px; border: 1px solid rgba(244, 239, 229, 0.12); background: rgba(244, 239, 229, 0.04); color: #cbc0b4; font-family: 'Fraunces', Georgia, serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; transition: background 0.18s ease-out, color 0.18s ease-out, border-color 0.18s ease-out; min-block-size: 44px; } .ds-season-chip--selected span { border-color: rgba(240, 198, 126, 0.42); background: rgba(240, 198, 126, 0.14); color: #f0c67e; } .ds-season-chip input:focus-visible + span { outline: 2px solid rgba(240, 198, 126, 0.8); outline-offset: 3px; border-color: rgba(240, 198, 126, 0.5); }

components.name: Tag
components.description: Categorical label on directory and player cards. Quiet; animates on parent card hover.
components.css: .ds-tag { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; min-height: 2.1rem; padding: 0.45rem 0.8rem; border-radius: 999px; border: 1px solid rgba(244, 239, 229, 0.08); background: rgba(244, 239, 229, 0.04); color: #cbc0b4; font-family: 'Fraunces', Georgia, serif; font-size: 0.9rem; transition: transform 0.18s ease-out, border-color 0.18s ease-out, background 0.18s ease-out, color 0.18s ease-out; } .ds-tag:hover, .ds-tag--highlighted { transform: translateY(-1px); border-color: rgba(240, 198, 126, 0.24); background: rgba(240, 198, 126, 0.08); color: #f4efe5; }

components.name: Content Panel
components.description: Primary content surface. Raised from ground by one tonal step and structural shadow.
components.html:
Season Stats

Player Leaderboard

Content here.
components.css: .ds-panel { padding: clamp(1.3rem, 1.8vw, 1.8rem); border-radius: 1.375rem; background: #111b24; border: 1px solid rgba(238, 210, 156, 0.16); box-shadow: 0 30px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.28); contain: layout paint; } .ds-panel__heading { display: grid; gap: clamp(0.45rem, 0.6vw, 0.65rem); margin-bottom: clamp(1.3rem, 1.8vw, 1.8rem); } .ds-panel__eyebrow { margin: 0; color: #79d8d0; font-family: 'Fraunces', Georgia, serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-panel h2 { margin: 0; font-family: 'Fraunces', Georgia, serif; font-size: clamp(1.5rem, 2.5vw, 2.1rem); font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.12; letter-spacing: 0.01em; color: #f4efe5; max-width: 18ch; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard form input. Dark opaque fill, amber focus ring, Fraunces body text.
components.css: .ds-field { display: grid; gap: 0.45rem; } .ds-field__label { color: #ffe0a5; font-family: 'Fraunces', Georgia, serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-field__input { width: 100%; border-radius: 1.125rem; border: 1px solid rgba(244, 239, 229, 0.1); background: rgba(22, 37, 49, 0.9); color: #f4efe5; font-family: 'Fraunces', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.45; padding: 0.9rem 0.95rem; } .ds-field__input::placeholder { color: rgba(244, 239, 229, 0.6); font-size: 0.9375rem; } .ds-field__input:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(240, 198, 126, 0.8); outline-offset: 3px; }

narrative.overview:
The system lives in a deliberate evening register: deep ink-navy surfaces that read like a room where analysts work after the crowd goes home. Keeper's Amber holds the corner like a good lamp, warm and decisive. Recorder's Blue-Green sits at the whiteboard edge, cool and precise. Together they define a space that feels focused and inhabited rather than assembled from a component library.

The product is a serious reference tool. Its aesthetic is a direct refusal of the visual language it could have borrowed: SaaS dashboards with their gradient-washed KPI tiles, gambling-adjacent sports sites with neon on black and animated fixtures, and generic dark mode tools that reach for purple and glow by default. What it reaches toward instead is the best data journalism and sports almanacs: composure under density, evidence before flourish, typography doing weight-bearing work.
keyCharacteristics: Dark-first; tonal panel layering as the primary depth signal
Two accents (amber primary, teal secondary) held at high rarity
Fraunces owns every word; Teko owns every large number
Pill-shaped interactive elements with quiet resting states
No side-stripe borders, no gradient text, no glassmorphism

rules.name: The Restraint Rule
rules.body: Keeper's Amber and Recorder's Blue-Green appear on ≤10% of any given screen. Use them on borders, kickers, and states — not as backgrounds.

rules.name: The Dark-Always Rule
rules.body: Never use #000 or #fff. Every neutral carries at least trace amber warmth.

rules.name: The Fraunces Rule
rules.body: Every word is Fraunces. Every large display number is Teko. Never reverse this.

rules.name: The Kicker Convention
rules.body: Eyebrows and section kickers are always Fraunces 600, 0.8125rem, 0.12em letter-spacing, uppercase. Recorder's Blue-Green on primary panels, Keeper's Amber on secondary contexts.

rules.name: The Layered Ground Rule
rules.body: Shadows signal structural separation or interaction response only. A panel gets a shadow because it's raised. A button gets a lift shadow on hover. Nothing else.

dos: Do use Fraunces for every text element including labels, kickers, headings, and body copy
Do use Teko only for large display numerics
Do hold Keeper's Amber and Recorder's Blue-Green to ≤10% of screen surface area
Do use pill (999px) border-radius for all buttons, chips, tags, and nav links
Do apply color-mix() tonal gradients for panel depth rather than new fixed hex values
Do set min-block-size: 44px on every interactive touch target
Do use the Keeper's Amber 2px focus outline consistently across all focusable elements
Do keep body line length at 54–65ch maximum
Do give major pages their own gradient accent variation on their hero panel
donts: Don't use #000000 or #ffffff — every neutral needs at least trace warmth
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored side stripe
Don't use background-clip: text with a gradient — use solid colors for text
Don't use glassmorphism (backdrop-filter: blur with semi-transparent cards)
Don't build big-number / small-label / gradient-accent hero templates (SaaS KPI cliché)
Don't use Teko for copy, labels, or headings that require reading
Don't design to feel like a gambling-adjacent sports site — no neon on black
Don't make every page identical — the system supports per-page emphasis
Don't add explanatory copy that restates what the heading or data already says
Don't use em dashes in copy
